definition: An exact net-spend amount for a selected set: add the positive magnitudes of active outflows in the set that are not principal legs of active owned-account transfers, then subtract the magnitudes of active linked refund/reversal credits in the set. Separately recorded fees and unlinked cash withdrawals remain included; unrelated inflows are excluded. A period can be negative when in-period refunds exceed in-period outflows. Avoid: raw signed account movement or every negative transaction.
